tasks.goal: Only the non-silent success branch in saveSiteInfo should stop using a blocking alert in static/js/view_api.js.
tasks.name: view api saveSiteInfo success feedback cleanup
tasks.instruction: Update only static/js/view_api.js. In saveSiteInfo(isSilent), replace only the non-silent success alert branch with the existing non-blocking success feedback flow. Keep isSilent behavior, saveIndicator behavior, error alerts, validation alerts, confirm dialogs, and unrelated reload logic unchanged.
acceptance: saveSiteInfo non-silent success no longer blocks with an extra OK click
saveSiteInfo silent branch still uses saveIndicator only
error and validation alerts still behave the same
tasks.rollback_plan: restore workspace snapshot and re-upload original target files if scope or verification fails
tasks.promotion_rule: promote only after the same acceptance passes again on a similar task
